title: Jumpstarter Structured Log Entry
description: Schema for structured JSON log lines emitted by Jumpstarter long-running services (controller, router, exporter). One JSON object per line (JSONL format).

component.description: Service component that emitted this log line.

logger.description: Python logger name (e.g. 'jumpstarter.exporter.session'). Present in Python services only.

lease_id.description: Kubernetes Lease resource name. Present when a lease is active.

exporter.description: Exporter name (from jumpstarter.dev/name label or Kubernetes resource name).

client.description: Client identity (Kubernetes Client resource name or token subject).

operation.description: Driver operation method name (e.g. 'flash', 'on', 'off', 'dump', 'connect'). Present in operation start/end log lines.

result.description: Operation outcome. Present only in operation completion log lines.

driver_type.description: Category of the driver that performed the operation.

error_type.description: Failure classification. Present only on operation failure log lines.

namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace in which the service is running. Auto-detected from environment or service account.
